title: secretx-gcp-sm: migrate put to WriteableSecretStore impl
description: Move the existing put method body out of 'impl SecretStore for XBackend' and into a new '#[async_trait::async_trait] impl WriteableSecretStore for XBackend' block. Add WriteableSecretStore to the crate's use import from secretx-core. The SecretStore impl block loses put entirely. All existing put tests remain and must still pass. Run cargo test -p <crate>.
